    Serialized Form

    • Package com.github.mrgarbagegamer

      • Class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationGeneratorTask

        class CombinationGeneratorTask extends RecursiveAction implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • cachedAdjacencyState
            long cachedAdjacencyState
            A bitmask representing the set of initially true cells toggled by the current CombinationGeneratorTask.prefix.

            This is a critical field for early-stage pruning. Instead of recomputing which true cells are affected by a prefix, each task inherits the state from its parent and updates it incrementally with a single XOR operation. This state is then used in CombinationGeneratorTask.canPotentiallySatisfyConstraints(int) to determine if the current path is viable. A value of -1 indicates an uninitialized state, used only by the root task.

            The use of a long limits this check to puzzles with 64 or fewer initially true cells, but all puzzles simulated in this project fall under this limit.

            Since:
            2025.07 - Cached adjacency state introduction
            See Also:
            • CombinationGeneratorTask.skipConstraintsCheck
            • CombinationGeneratorTask.TRUE_CELL_ADJACENCY_MASKS
            • CombinationGeneratorTask.canPotentiallySatisfyConstraints(int)
            • CombinationGeneratorTask.ensureTrueCellMasks(short[])
            • CombinationGeneratorTask.init(short[], int, long, boolean, boolean)
            • Grid.areAdjacent(short, short)
            • Grid.findTrueCells()
            Performance Characteristics:
            O(prefixLength) for initial computation, and O(1) for updates.
            Threading Model:
            Thread-safe due to ForkJoinTask isolation.
            Memory Management:
            Minimal memory footprint of 8 bytes as a long.
          • prefix
            short[] prefix
            The sequence of clicks made so far, forming the base for sub-tasks or final combinations.

            Each task is defined by its prefix. For an intermediate task, it will fork new tasks by appending a new click to this prefix. For a leaf task, it will generate final combinations by appending a final click. The short[] holding the prefix is obtained from a pre-allocated ArrayPool to prevent heap allocation. To prevent array resizing, we always allocate arrays of size CombinationGeneratorTask.numClicks, tracking the current length of the prefix with CombinationGeneratorTask.prefixLength.

            Since:
            2025.06 - Fork Join Refactor
            See Also:
            • CombinationGeneratorTask.recycleOwnResources(GeneratorContext)
            • ArrayPool
            • ArrayPool.get()
            • ArrayPool.put(short[])
            • CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext
            • CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext.prefixArrayPool
            Performance Characteristics:
            O(1) for adding clicks, O(prefixLength) for copying to subtasks.
            Threading Model:
            Thread-safe due to ForkJoinTask isolation.
            Memory Management:
            Fixed memory footprint of ~numClicks * 2 bytes per task, using pooling to avoid allocations.
          • prefixLength
            int prefixLength
            The current length of the CombinationGeneratorTask.prefix array.

            This value determines the task's position in the generation tree (root, intermediate, or leaf) and is used as an index for appending the next click, since prefix arrays are always sized to CombinationGeneratorTask.numClicks.

            Since:
            2025.06 - Fork Join Refactor
            See Also:
            • CombinationGeneratorTask.compute()
            • CombinationGeneratorTask.prefix
            Performance Characteristics:
            O(1) access time.
            Threading Model:
            Thread-safe due to ForkJoinTask isolation.
            Memory Management:
            Minimal memory footprint of 4 bytes as an int.
          • prefixParity
            boolean prefixParity
            A boolean indicating the parity of clicks affecting the first initially true cell in the CombinationGeneratorTask.prefix.

            Like CombinationGeneratorTask.cachedAdjacencyState, this value is incrementally built in the generator threads to allow for O(1) checks in leaf tasks.

            Since:
            2025.10 - Prefix Parity Pre-computation
            See Also:
            • CombinationGeneratorTask.computeIntermediateSubtasksConstraintPath(GeneratorContext)
            • CombinationGeneratorTask.computeIntermediateSubtasksSkipPath(GeneratorContext)
            • CombinationGeneratorTask.init(short[], int, long, boolean, boolean)
            Performance Characteristics:
            O(1) for updates during task initialization, which avoids a previously O(prefixLength) operation in the leaf task path.
            Threading Model:
            Thread-safe due to ForkJoinTask isolation.
            Memory Management:
            Minimal memory footprint of 1 byte as a boolean.
          • skipConstraintsCheck
            boolean skipConstraintsCheck
            A flag indicating that this task and all its descendants are guaranteed to satisfy the constraints, allowing future checks to be skipped.

            This flag is set to true by CombinationGeneratorTask.canPotentiallySatisfyConstraints(int) when a CombinationGeneratorTask.prefix is found to toggle every initially true cell. Because additional clicks cannot "un-satisfy" this condition, all child tasks spawned from this point can inherit this flag and bypass the expensive constraint check. This enables a much faster, branch-free generation path in CombinationGeneratorTask.computeIntermediateSubtasksSkipPath(GeneratorContext).

            Since:
            2025.08 - Reduced Branching Refactor
            See Also:
            • CombinationGeneratorTask.cachedAdjacencyState
            • CombinationGeneratorTask.computeIntermediateSubtasks(GeneratorContext)
            Performance Characteristics:
            O(1) for checks and updates.
            Threading Model:
            Thread-safe due to ForkJoinTask isolation.
            Memory Management:
            Minimal memory footprint of 1 byte as a boolean.

      • Class com.github.mrgarbagegamer.CombinationMessage

        class CombinationMessage extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • format
            Grid.ValueFormat format
            The Grid.ValueFormat of the combination stored in CombinationMessage.list.
            Since:
            2025.05 - CombinationMessage Introduction
            See Also:
            • CombinationMessage.convertTo(Grid.ValueFormat)
            Performance Characteristics:
            O(1) assignments and retrievals.
            Memory Management:
            Minimal footprint; enum reference.
          • list
            short[] list
            The combination data. The interpretation of this data depends on the CombinationMessage.format field.
            Since:
            2025.05 - CombinationMessage Introduction
            See Also:
            • CombinationMessage.getCombination(Grid.ValueFormat)
            • Grid.ValueFormat
            Performance Characteristics:
            O(1) assignments and retrievals, O(list.length) for format conversion.
            Memory Management:
            Minimal footprint of ~list.length × 2 bytes as a short[].

    Performance-optimized brute-force solver for hexagonal grid Lights Out puzzles
